name: Pastichio
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pint white sauce (low fat yogurt or fromage frais)
1/2 glass red wine (or 3 tbsp red wine vinegar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion in a little stock for 5-10 minutes.
2. Add garlic, green pepper, and mushrooms; cook for another 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Mix in tomatoes, lentils, oregano, cinnamon, wine (or vinegar), and remaining stock or water. Bring to a boil and stir well.
4. Simmer about 45 minutes until lentils are soft and liquid is absorbed. Season with salt and pepper if desired.
5. Preheat oven to gas mark 6/200°C/400°F. Boil water for cooking macaroni.
6. Cook macaroni in boiling water until just tender, then drain well.
7. Line a shallow, oblong, ovenproof dish with cooked pasta.
8. Spoon lentil mixture over the pasta.
9. Spread yogurt or fromage frais evenly over the top.
10. Bake for 40-50 minutes until browned and bubbly. Serve hot.
